data.title: Montfort Capital Announces Strategic Sale of Mortgage Business
data.description:
An update from TIMIA Capital ( (TSE:MONT) ) is now available.

Montfort Capital Corp. has announced an update regarding the potential sale of its mortgage lending business to Brightpath Holdings Corporation. The sale, expected to close on March 26, 2025, marks a strategic shift for Montfort as it aims to concentrate on high-growth lending segments. The transaction involves the transfer of shares and securities, with the buyer assuming intercompany indebtedness and issuing a promissory note. This move is seen as a significant milestone in Montfort’s operational focus and industry positioning.

More about TIMIA Capital

Montfort Capital Corp. is a provider of focused private credit strategies catering to institutional investors, family offices, and wealth managers. The company is involved in the mortgage lending business and is based in Toronto.

YTD Price Performance: 50.0%

Average Trading Volume: 66,429

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$5.99M

For an in-depth examination of MONT stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Hero MotoCorp Announces Leadership Change with Resignation of Ms. Reema Jain
data.description:
Hero Motocorp Limited ( (IN:HEROMOTOCO) ) has issued an announcement.

Hero MotoCorp Limited has announced the resignation of Ms. Reema Jain, effective April 17, 2025, as part of its compliance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements. This change in the company’s leadership may influence its strategic direction and operations, impacting stakeholders and potentially altering its position in the competitive automotive market.

More about Hero Motocorp Limited

Hero MotoCorp Limited is a leading company in the automotive industry, primarily engaged in the manufacturing and sale of motorcycles and scooters. It is headquartered in New Delhi, India, and is known for its focus on providing affordable and efficient two-wheeler vehicles to a wide market.

data.title: Pearson Initiates £350 Million Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Pearson ( (GB:PSON) ) has issued an update.

Pearson PLC has announced the purchase of 191,697 of its ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange as part of its £350 million share buyback program. This transaction, executed through Morgan Stanley & Co. International plc, marks the beginning of the first £175 million tranche, reflecting Pearson’s strategic move to enhance shareholder value and optimize its capital structure.

More about Pearson

Pearson PLC is a global leader in the education industry, primarily offering educational products and services. The company focuses on providing learning materials, technologies, and assessments to students and educators worldwide.

data.title: Dialight PLC Expands Share Listing to Boost Market Presence
data.description:
Dialight ( (GB:DIA) ) has provided an update.

Dialight PLC has applied for an increase of 250,000 new ordinary shares to be listed on the Official List of the Financial Conduct Authority and the London Stock Exchange. This move is part of the Dialight Performance Share Plan and is expected to enhance the company’s market presence by aligning with existing shares, with admission anticipated around 24 March 2025.

More about Dialight

Dialight PLC operates in the lighting industry, specializing in LED lighting solutions. The company focuses on providing energy-efficient and durable lighting products for industrial applications.

data.title: Lion Finance Group PLC Executes Share Buyback
data.description:
An update from Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) is now available.

Lion Finance Group PLC announced a transaction involving the repurchase of 5,000 ordinary shares as part of its ongoing share buyback and cancellation program. This move is expected to reduce the total number of ordinary shares with voting rights to 44,205,040, potentially impacting shareholder calculations under the FCA’s Disclosure Guidance and Transparency Rules. The company will continue to make further announcements regarding additional purchases under this program.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

Lion Finance Group PLC is a FTSE 250 holding company with subsidiaries providing banking and financial services in the high-growth markets of Georgia and Armenia. The company operates through leading universal banks, Bank of Georgia and Ameriabank, focusing on customer-centric services to drive business growth, maintain high profitability, and generate strong returns while contributing positively to the communities they serve.

data.title: Ashtead Group Executes Share Buyback as Part of $1.5 Billion Program
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Ashtead ( (GB:AHT) ).

Ashtead Group plc announced the repurchase of 84,627 of its ordinary shares as part of its $1.5 billion share repurchase program. The transaction, executed on March 20, 2025, involved shares purchased at an average price of 4,391 pence, with Barclays Bank PLC acting as the broker. This buyback reduces the number of shares in circulation, potentially increasing the value of remaining shares and reflecting the company’s confidence in its financial position. The transaction impacts stakeholders by altering the shareholding structure and may influence market perceptions of the company’s stock.

More about Ashtead

Ashtead Group plc operates in the equipment rental industry, providing a range of services and products primarily focused on construction, industrial, and general tool rental markets. The company is a key player in the market, with a significant presence in both the UK and North America.

YTD Price Performance: -12.07%

data.title: RELX plc Expands Share Buyback Program with Latest Purchase
data.description:
RELX plc ( (GB:REL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

RELX plc announced the purchase of 257,172 of its own ordinary shares on the London Stock Exchange, which will be held as treasury shares. This transaction is part of a broader share buyback initiative, with the company having acquired nearly 10 million shares since January 2025. The move is likely aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure, reflecting a strategic focus on financial management and market confidence.

More about RELX plc

RELX plc is a global provider of information-based analytics and decision tools for professional and business customers across various industries. The company operates in sectors such as scientific, technical, and medical, legal, risk and business analytics, and exhibitions, offering a range of products and services that support decision-making and improve productivity.

data.title: Lion Finance Group Executives Exercise Share Options
data.description:
Bank of Georgia Group Plc ( (GB:BGEO) ) has shared an update.

Lion Finance Group PLC has announced the exercise of nil-cost options over ordinary shares by several of its top executives, including CEO Archil Gachechiladze, Deputy CEO and CFO Sulkhan Gvalia, Deputy CEO Nutsa Gogilashvili, and Deputy CEO Zurab Kokosadze. These transactions, conducted outside of a trading venue, reflect the company’s ongoing commitment to align its leadership’s interests with those of its stakeholders, potentially enhancing confidence in its strategic direction and market positioning.

More about Bank of Georgia Group Plc

Lion Finance Group PLC is a FTSE 250 holding company that operates through its subsidiaries, providing banking and financial services in the high-growth Georgian and Armenian markets. It operates leading universal banks, Bank of Georgia in Georgia and Ameriabank in Armenia, focusing on customer-centric services to drive business growth, sustain high profitability, and generate strong returns, while contributing positively to the communities they serve.
